games.headline: Philadelphia 5, Toronto 2 — Sánchez (W)
games.summary: Cristopher Sánchez pitched 7.0 innings, allowing 2 earned runs with 10 strikeouts, leading Philadelphia past Toronto 5-2 at Rogers Centre. Patrick Corbin lasted 3.0 innings, giving up 5 earned runs, 3 strikeouts, 4 walks. Offensively for Philadelphia: A.García homered with 2 RBI. E.Clement went deep for Toronto. Jhoan Duran closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Tampa Bay 3, Boston 1 — Legumina (W)
games.summary: Casey Legumina pitched 1.1 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 1 strikeouts, leading Tampa Bay past Boston 3-1 at Tropicana Field. Connelly Early lasted 4.2 innings, giving up 2 earned runs, 6 strikeouts, 4 walks. Offensively for Tampa Bay: Y.Díaz homered with 2 RBI. M.Mayer went deep for Boston. Bryan Baker closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Washington 4, San Francisco 3 — Beeter (W)
games.summary: Clayton Beeter pitched 1.1 innings, allowing 2 earned runs, leading Washington past San Francisco 4-3 at Oracle Park. Keaton Winn lasted 0.2 innings, giving up 3 earned runs, 1 strikeouts. Offensively for Washington: L.Jr. went 2-for-4, including 1 double with 1 RBI; C.Abrams went 2-for-4 with 2 RBI. Gus Varland closed it out for the save.

games.headline: San Diego 6, Cincinnati 2 — Morejon (W)
games.summary: Adrian Morejon pitched 1.2 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 1 strikeouts, leading San Diego past Cincinnati 6-2 at Petco Park. Andrew Abbott lasted 6.0 innings, giving up 3 earned runs, 6 strikeouts, 2 walks. Offensively for San Diego: F.Fermin homered with 2 RBI; X.Bogaerts went 2-for-4, including 1 double; J.Bowen went 2-for-3.

games.headline: Houston 5, Los Angeles 4 (F/10)
games.summary: Josh Hader pitched 1.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 3 strikeouts, leading Houston past Los Angeles 5-4 at Angel Stadium. Sam Aldegheri lasted 1.0 innings, giving up 0 earned runs, 1 strikeouts. Offensively for Houston: C.Walker went 2-for-4, including 1 double with 2 RBI; C.Smith went 2-for-5, including 2 doubles with 1 RBI. Z.Neto went deep for Los Angeles. Bryan Abreu closed it out for the save. The teams needed 10 innings to decide it.

games.headline: New York 7, Cleveland 5 (F/10)
games.summary: David Bednar pitched 1.2 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 3 strikeouts, leading New York past Cleveland 7-5 at Progressive Field. Shawn Armstrong lasted 1.0 innings, giving up 1 earned runs, 2 walks. Offensively for New York: P.Goldschmidt homered with 3 RBI; R.McMahon homered; T.Grisham went 2-for-4. A.Martínez went deep for Cleveland. The teams needed 10 innings to decide it.

games.headline: Seattle 6, Baltimore 3 — Hancock (W)
games.summary: Emerson Hancock pitched 5.0 innings, allowing 1 earned runs with 3 strikeouts, leading Seattle past Baltimore 6-3 at Oriole Park at Camden Yards. Trey Gibson lasted 4.2 innings, giving up 3 earned runs, 1 walks. Offensively for Seattle: J.Naylor homered with 4 RBI; R.Arozarena went 3-for-4 with 1 RBI; D.Canzone went 2-for-3, including 1 double. Andrés Muñoz closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Milwaukee 15, Athletics 14 (F/12)
games.summary: Abner Uribe pitched 1.1 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 2 strikeouts, leading Milwaukee past Athletics 15-14 at Las Vegas Ballpark. José Suarez lasted 2.0 innings, giving up 0 earned runs, 4 strikeouts. Offensively for Milwaukee: B.Turang homered with 3 RBI; W.Contreras homered with 3 RBI; J.Bauers homered with 3 RBI. S.Langeliers, N.Kurtz, J.Heim went deep for Athletics. Chad Patrick closed it out for the save. The teams needed 12 innings to decide it.
